extract: Dunsparce (Japanese: ノコッチ Nokocchi) is a Normal-type Pokémon introduced in Generation II. It evolves into Dudunsparce when leveled up while knowing Hyper Drill. Dunsparce will evolve into one of two forms of Dudunsparce, Two-Segment Form or Three-Segment Form, with a 1/100 chance of evolving into Three-Segment Form Dudunsparce. (Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.)
